description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway body reminiscent of the classic Les Paul design, finished in a worn, distressed silver or light gray color. The body features two humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and four control knobs, all with metallic and black accents. The bridge is a fixed tune-o-matic style, and the pickguard is black and mounted on the lower bout. The neck is dark, likely rosewood or ebony, with dot inlays and a set-in construction. The headstock is angled, with three tuning pegs on each side and metallic hardware, but no visible logo. The overall appearance suggests a solid, robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or garage bands.
description: A distressed silver single-cutaway electric guitar with dual humbuckers, black pickguard, and metallic hardware. The design is classic and robust, ideal for urban music scenes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full body, pickups, control knobs, pickguard, and neck with dot inlays.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the headstock, tuning pegs, and the slim profile of the neck and body.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the back of the body, neck joint, and the overall thickness of the guitar.
description_view_3: Side perspective emphasizing the body depth, bridge, and the three-dimensional contours of the guitar.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, standard Les Paul-style shape
